title: coelachyrum yemenicum
intro: Coelachyrum yemenicum, a plant species native to Yemen, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Coelachyrum yemenicum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is valued for its potential to soothe and calm the body.
